title: rq
summary:
Simple job queues for Python 
 RQ Redis Queue is a simple Python library for queueing jobs and processing them in the background with workers. It is backed by Redis or Valkey and is designed to have a low barrier to entry while scaling incredibly well for large applications. It can be integrated into your web stack easily, making it suitable for projects
